title: Kombu and Dasima Seafood Stew
description: A light and flavorful stew from Malaysian cuisine, ideal for a dinner option. The combination of kombu and dasima provides a rich umami taste, while the seafood adds protein and variety.

ingredients.name: malaysian chili flakes
ingredients.notes: or substitute with red pepper flakes

instructions: Combine dasima and kombu in a large pot.
Add 4 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add goosefish and cook for 5 minutes.
Add floral oil, chili flakes, and salt. Stir to combine.
Simmer for an additional 5 minutes or until the fish is cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped scallions if desired.
